heading: Guidance document regarding product promotion using the Internet
label: 379d–5 Guidance document regarding product promotion using the Internet
text: Not later than 2 years after , the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall issue guidance that describes Food and Drug Administration policy regarding the promotion, using the Internet (including social media), of medical products that are regulated by such Administration.July 9, 2012
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Food and Drug Administration Safety and Innovation Act, and not as part of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act which comprises this chapter.
